chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 931 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 29.05.2025 None present for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General along with Kashif Hussain Memon, Assistant Education Officer (Primary) Ghotki at Mirpur Mathelo, Zahid Hussain, Executive Engineer, Education Works, Ghotki and Saleem Ahmed Shaikh, Chief Engineer Education Region, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Compliance report filed by Respondent No.6 along with copy of NIT dated 18.02.2025, which reflects that subject School of the petitioner is at Serial No.16 of the NIT. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner, therefore, this petition is disposed of with direction to the respondents to complete the construction work of the subject School as per NIT. Judge Judge ARBROHI
